title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
summary: 文章探讨了新一代AI模型如何延续并强化了早期模型的优势，分析了技术进步带来的性能提升和应用扩展。
highlights: Newer models build upon the same foundational advantages, achieving greater efficiency.
The evolution of AI models demonstrates consistent improvement in key metrics.
Advancements enable broader real-world applications without losing core strengths.
